mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatHoldReq - 현재 진행중인 재고보류 요청 조회 SQL */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT_HOLD_REQ HR INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON HR.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND HR.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY WHERE HR.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND HR.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND AR.WRHOUS_SE = 'ATMC' AND HR.WKSTATUS = '10'

/* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectTaDt - 현재 진행중인 로케이션 이동작업 조회 SQL */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_DT TD INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LCFR ON TD.CTKEY = LCFR.CTKEY AND TD.FR_LCKEY = LCFR.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR ARFR ON LCFR.CTKEY = ARFR.CTKEY AND LCFR.ARKEY = ARFR.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LCTO ON TD.CTKEY = LCTO.CTKEY AND TD.TO_LCKEY = LCTO.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR ARTO ON LCTO.CTKEY = ARTO.CTKEY AND LCTO.ARKEY = ARTO.ARKEY WHERE TD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND TD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND TD.TA_DTTYPE = '20' AND TD.WKSTATUS IN ('50','55','60','65') AND ( ARFR.WRHOUS_SE = 'ATMC' OR ARTO.WRHOUS_SE = 'ATMC' )

/* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatInfoMap - 재고 속성 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , IVATKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , PRODUCTDATE , EXPIREDATE , ATTRIBUTE1 , ATTRIBUTE2 , ATTRIBUTE3 , ATTRIBUTE4 , ATTRIBUTE5 , PRODUCTLOT , IVATSTATUS , IBCONFIRMDATE , LOGGRPCD , ACKEY , STORE_KEY , ATTRIBUTE6 , ATTRIBUTE7 , ATTRIBUTE8 , ATTRIBUTE9 , IDNTFC_NO , BDDR_GNRL_ITEM_IBYN , CON_QTY , NET_WGT , CFQTY , PLT_TYPE , PLT_LOAD_QTY , PLT_LOAD_HEIGHT FROM TWORK_INFO_IVAT WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND UOM = #{uom} AND EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate}
/* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatkeyGen - 재고 속성 키 조회 SQL */ SELECT FN_GET_KEYCOUNT_IVAT(#{ctkey} , #{surkey}) AS IVATKEY

/* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatxlculc - 재고 조회 SQL */ SELECT CTKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , ULCKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , TTQTY , AVQTY , ALQTY , PIQTY , PAQTY , LOQTY , HOQTY , IVATSTATUS FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC WHERE CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OWKEY = #{owkey} AND ICKEY = #{ickey} AND LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVATKEY = #{ivatkey}

/* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnrevisionAfter - 재고 조정 후 조회 SQL */ SELECT #{prtypecd} AS PRTYPECD , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS ADJDATE , A.CTKEY , A.IVATKEY , A.LCKEY , A.ULCKEY , A.OWKEY , A.ICKEY , #{ttqty} AS BF_TTQTY , #{avqty} AS BF_AVQTY , #{alqty} AS BF_ALQTY , #{piqty} AS BF_PIQTY , #{paqty} AS BF_PAQTY , #{loqty} AS BF_LOQTY , #{hoqty} AS BF_HOQTY , A.TTQTY AS AF_TTQTY , A.AVQTY AS AF_AVQTY , A.ALQTY AS AF_ALQTY , A.PIQTY AS AF_PIQTY , A.PAQTY AS AF_PAQTY , A.LOQTY AS AF_LOQTY , A.HOQTY AS AF_HOQTY , A.IVATSTATUS , A.LOGGRPCD FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY WHERE A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND A.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND A.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND A.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey}
mapper.insert: /* wms-inventory-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - insertIvatxlcxulcAdj - 재고 조정 이력 등록 SQL */ INSERT INTO TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC_ADJ ( PRTYPECD , ADJDATE , SEQ , CTKEY , IVATKEY , LCKEY , ULCKEY , OWKEY , ICKEY , BF_TTQTY , BF_AVQTY , BF_ALQTY , BF_PIQTY , BF_PAQTY , BF_LOQTY , BF_HOQTY , AF_TTQTY , AF_AVQTY , AF_ALQTY , AF_PIQTY , AF_PAQTY , AF_LOQTY , AF_HOQTY , IVATSTATUS , LOGGRPCD , IV_ADJ_REASON , IV_ADJ_DT_REASON , UPDATEKEY , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) VALUES ( #{prtypecd} , #{adjdate} , #{seq} , #{ctkey} , #{ivatkey} , #{lckey} , #{ulckey} , #{owkey} , #{ickey} , COALESCE(#{bfTtqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfAvqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfAlqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfPiqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfPaqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfLoqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{bfHoqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afTtqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afAvqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afAlqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afPiqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afPaqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afLoqty}, 0) , COALESCE(#{afHoqty}, 0) , #{ivatstatus} , #{loggrpcd} , '10' , #{ivAdjDtReason} , (SELECT TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISSFF')) , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP , 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') , #{surkey} )
mapper.select: /* wms-inbound-invnrevision-sql-oracle.xml - invnAvqtyCheck - 상품 정보 SQL */ SELECT CASE WHEN HOLDREQ.WKSTATUS IS NULL AND 0 <= COALESCE(IVATXLCXULC.AVQTY, 0) - COALESCE(TADT.FR_QTY, 0) - COALESCE(REQ.REQQTY, 0) - #{qty} THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END USE_YN , COALESCE(IVATXLCXULC.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY , COALESCE(TADT.FR_QTY, 0) AS FR_QTY , COALESCE(REQ.REQQTY, 0) AS REQQTY , COALESCE(IVATXLCXULC.AVQTY, 0) - COALESCE(TADT.FR_QTY, 0) - COALESCE(REQ.REQQTY, 0) - #{qty} AS AV_TOTAL_QTY , HOLDREQ.WKSTATUS AS HOLD_WKSTATUS FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC IVATXLCXULC /* 재고 */ LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IVAT ON IVATXLCXULC.CTKEY = IVAT.CTKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.OWKEY = IVAT.OWKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.IVATKEY = IVAT.IVATKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.ICKEY = IVAT.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN ( /* 작업지시 : 재고이동( 작업생성, 작업완료가 아닌 것 ) */ SELECT TADT.CTKEY, TADT.OWKEY, TADT.FR_IVATKEY, TADT.FR_LCKEY, SUM(FR_QTY) AS FR_QTY FROM TWORK_INFO_TA_DT TADT WHERE TADT.TA_DTTYPE IN ('20') AND TADT.WKSTATUS NOT IN ('00', '90') GROUP BY TADT.CTKEY, TADT.OWKEY, TADT.FR_IVATKEY, TADT.FR_LCKEY ) TADT ON IVATXLCXULC.CTKEY = TADT.CTKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.OWKEY = TADT.OWKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.IVATKEY = TADT.FR_IVATKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.LCKEY = TADT.FR_LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_REPLENISHMENT_REQ REQ /* 재고보충요청( 보충지시, 보충지시 취소 요청, 보충지시 취소 실패) */ ON IVATXLCXULC.CTKEY = REQ.CTKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.OWKEY = REQ.OWKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.ICKEY = REQ.ICKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.IVATKEY = REQ.IVATKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.LCKEY = REQ.LCKEY AND REQ.WKSTATUS IN ('10','30','40') LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT_HOLD_REQ HOLDREQ /* 재고보류요청( 재고보류/해제 요청 중 ) */ ON IVATXLCXULC.CTKEY = HOLDREQ.CTKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.OWKEY = HOLDREQ.OWKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.IVATKEY = HOLDREQ.IVATKEY AND IVATXLCXULC.LCKEY = HOLDREQ.LCKEY AND HOLDREQ.WKSTATUS = '10' WHERE IVATXLCXULC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVATXLCXULC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVATXLCXULC.ICKEY = #{ickey} AND IVATXLCXULC.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVAT.EXPIREDATE = #{expiredate} AND IVAT.UOM = #{uom}
